diagrams.title: Coordinate Vector Representation
diagrams.description: Shows how a vector v is represented as linear combination of basis vectors in R²
diagrams.purpose: Visualize that coordinates are scalars multiplying basis vectors to reconstruct the original vector

diagrams.title: Change of Basis in R²
diagrams.description: Same vector shown with two different coordinate systems (standard and skewed)
diagrams.purpose: Understand that the vector itself doesn't change, only its coordinate description changes with basis

diagrams.title: Transition Matrix Mapping
diagrams.description: Flow diagram showing how coordinates transform between bases via transition matrix
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the transformation process and relationship between different coordinate representations

diagrams.title: Basis as Coordinate Frame
diagrams.description: 3D view showing basis vectors defining a coordinate frame
elements: Three basis vectors b₁, b₂, b₃
Sample vector with its coordinate components
diagrams.purpose: Understand basis as defining a coordinate system/frame in n-dimensional space
